name: Error Registry Entry
about: Add or correct an entry in the ION error code registry
title: "[ERROR] ION-XXXX"
labels: error-registry

## Error registry contribution

**Error code** (existing or proposed):
- Existing codes follow pattern ION-4xxx (BAP request errors), ION-5xxx (BPP response errors)
- For a new code, propose the next available number in the appropriate range

**HTTP status:** 400 | 422 | 500

**Category:** BAP_REQUEST | BPP_RESPONSE | ION_CENTRAL | NETWORK

**Title:**
- id (Bahasa Indonesia):
- en (English):

**Description** (what triggers this error):

**Affected field** (dot-notation path):

**Affected APIs** (which calls can trigger it):

**Resolution** (exact steps to fix — be specific about field names and values):

**How you encountered it** (optional — which implementation, what payload):

---

*For new codes, a working group member will assign the final code number.*
